text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30, brush my teeth, and have a light breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. After that, I spend 10 minutes stretching or doing a quick yoga routine. By 8:00, I start my workday at my desk, usually focusing on tasks until lunchtime. I take a short break at noon to eat and walk around the block. In the afternoon, I finish my main projects. At 5:30, I exercise—either a jog or a home workout. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading, or watching a show. I end the day by writing in my journal and going to bed at 10:00. This routine keeps me balanced and productive.
